title: Clinic Assistants (5.5 days, Specialist Clinic)
description:
Job Highlights

  • A subsidiary of Alliance Healthcare Group Limited.
  • Working hours: 5.5 days' week (Monday to Friday, 8.30am to 5.30pm and Saturday, 9am to 1pm).
  • Working Location: Farrer Park and/or Novena (ability to travel to either work locations).

About the Opportunity

This is an excellent opportunity to grow with us and experience working in a growing team!

Our ENT specialist clinics provides high quality treatments relating to Ear, Nose and Throat conditions.

What You'll be Doing

  • Perform daily operational duties at outpatient clinic.
  • Register patients and provide frontline customer service.
  • Process of billing transactions under different Government schemes and managed care programmes.
  • Manage inventory and replenish of medicines and consumable items.
  • Operate Clinic Management System (CMS).
  • Assist with other ad-hoc duties assigned by Clinic Supervisor.

What We Are Looking for

  • Entry Level specialized in Healthcare - Nurse/Medical Support & Assistant or equivalent.
  • Past experience in outpatient operations and/or with valid nurse practising certificate preferred.
  • Familiar with MOH regulatory requirements.
  • Computer literacy.
  • Good interpersonal and teamwork skills.
  • Able to multitask and work in a dynamic environment.

We regret to inform that only shortlisted applicants will be notified for an interview.

To learn more about our Organization, please visit:

  • https://alliancehealthcare.com.sg.
  • https://www.myentspecialist.sg.

postedCompany.description:
Alliance is a reliable medical brand trusted by more than 1,000,000 individuals in the region, a Healthcare organisation specialising in Corporate Health solutions, a leading wholesale Pharmaceutical company facilitating timely access of cutting-edge medications to the region, and a safe haven where our patients can count on their friendly family doctors and medical specialists to treat their health problems.


As a physician-led and physician-owned Healthcare organisation, we know what is important to those who matter to us - our patients. Since our inception, quality healthcare and evidence-based medical treatment for our patients have always been our priorities.


At Alliance, we strive to be a next-generation Healthcare company that harnesses the power of technologies and patient data to provide cost-effective and efficient services for our patients and corporate clients. The intelligence from our data of over 1,000,000 healthcare users offers us insights into disease trends and healthcare utilisation, which empower our corporate clients and insurance partners to maximise their returns on their health dollar as well as improve the delivery of care.


Since our establishment in 1994, Alliance has grown from a humble Clinic into a technology-driven healthcare organisation with multi-faceted services and a Global presence in China, Japan, India, Malaysia, Israel, Sri Lanka and Vietnam.


At Alliance, keeping our patients healthy and happy is our top priority.
postedCompany.name: ALLIANCE HEALTHCARE GROUP LIMITED
